steps.title: Place the earlier past event
steps.content: The critic watched The Maltese Falcon and wrote the review in the past. The phrase before that points to an even earlier state, so the sentence needs past perfect tense.

steps.title: Use past perfect tense
steps.content: A relates the state to the present, C is present tense, and D describes an ongoing past action instead of an earlier completed state. The answer is B.
